_comment: Bundle-size budgets for @pellux/goodvibes-sdk runtime entry points.
Methodology: gzip_bytes = ceil(actual_gzipped_bytes * 1.2) for the last
The 1.2x multiplier provides 20% growth headroom before CI fails.
To update after a legitimate bundle-size change or a new entry is added:
1. Run `bun run bundle:check` to see the current actual sizes.
2. Set gzip_bytes to ceil(actual * 1.2) for each changed entry.
3. Keep this comment free of stale wave/date-specific rationale.
Entry keys must match the `exports` map keys in packages/sdk/package.json exactly.

..rationale: full SDK re-export entry — re-exports all sub-entries; measured 235 B gzip * 1.2

./auth.rationale: auth surface with TokenStore, SessionManager, PermissionResolver, AutoRefreshCoordinator + createAutoRefreshMiddleware (Wave 9: transport-boundary auto-refresh); measured 2747 B gzip * 1.15

./browser.rationale: companion browser surface with localStorage token store; measured 997 B gzip * 1.2

./contracts.rationale: contract re-export shim; measured 68 B gzip * 1.2

./contracts/node.rationale: Node-only contract re-export shim; measured 86 B gzip * 1.2

./daemon.rationale: daemon route handler re-export shim; measured 65 B gzip * 1.2

./errors.rationale: error taxonomy re-export shim; measured 65 B gzip * 1.2

./expo.rationale: Expo with SecureStore helper; measured 396 B gzip * 1.2

./operator.rationale: operator SDK client re-export shim; measured 67 B gzip * 1.2

./peer.rationale: peer SDK client re-export shim; measured 63 B gzip * 1.2

./react-native.rationale: RN/Hermes companion surface; measured 1072 B gzip * 1.2

./transport-direct.rationale: SDK direct-transport facade backed by transport-core; measured 93 B gzip * 1.2

./transport-realtime.rationale: SSE + WebSocket connectors re-export shim; measured 75 B gzip * 1.2
